LUXURY 55+ COMMUNITY RENOVATED TO PERFECTION Welcome to this completely remodeled 2 bedroom/2 bathroom condo, boasting a spacious 2 car attached garage. Step inside this gem, nestled within the highly sought-after maintenance-free community of Kings Point. With new vinyl floors and charming plantation shutters throughout, this home exudes both style and comfort. Entertain your friends in the generously sized dining room. The kitchen itself is a delight, featuring all new appliances.  Adjacent to the kitchen, you'll find a extra room that can serve many purposes an office, den, or a cozy seating area. The master bathroom offers a spacious shower, Dual sinks and a large vanity mirror add a touch of luxury. The guest bathroom is equally inviting, with a lovely shower and tub combo. As you approach the house, the well-maintained and landscaped lawn, adorned with easy-to-grow shrubbery and a warm neutral color palette, creates an instant feeling of home. Inside, the plantation shutters not only provide aesthetic appeal but also allow you to control the inside temperature to your liking.  Kings Point itself offers an array of amenities, including two beautiful clubhouses, an 850-seat veterans theater, heated pools, hot tubs, and an elegant spa. Tennis courts, a golf course, billiards, and pickleball courts cater to your active lifestyle, while state-of-the-art fitness centers and numerous social and sports clubs ensure a completely new and engaging entertaining experience.  Sun City Center provides convenient access to doctors, hospitals, shopping, banking, and restaurants, with the added bonus of golf cart accessibility. Situated between Sarasota and Tampa, this location is perfect for a quick trip to airports, excellent shopping, dining, professional sports, cultural centers, beaches, and entertainment.  Come and experience the epitome of comfort and luxury in this remodeled condo, located in the desirable Kings Point
